parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT jo.id AS "JobId", jo.job_title, jo.department FROM job_openings jo JOIN shortlist s ON jo.id = s.job_opening_id WHERE s.status IN ('shortlisted', 'interviewed') AND jo.is_active = true ORDER BY jo.job_title

SELECT COALESCE(e.id, 0) AS "EvaluationId", c.candidate_name AS "FullName", c.email AS "Email", ROUND(COALESCE(e.overall_score, 0)::numeric, 1) AS "OverallScore", c.id AS "CandidateId" FROM shortlist s JOIN candidates c ON c.id = s.candidate_id LEFT JOIN evaluations e ON e.candidate_id = s.candidate_id AND e.job_opening_id = s.job_opening_id WHERE s.job_opening_id = {{ $json.jobId }}::integer AND s.status IN ('shortlisted', 'interviewed') ORDER BY COALESCE(e.overall_score, 0) DESC NULLS LAST

INSERT INTO interview_sessions (
  job_opening_id, candidate_id, evaluation_id, candidate_name,
  duration_seconds, transcript, qa_pairs,
  score_communication, score_technical, score_confidence, score_culture_fit, score_overall,
  summary, recommendation, per_question, recording_path, requirements_match
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.jobId }}, {{ $json.candidateId }},
  {{ $json.evaluationId !== null && $json.evaluationId !== undefined ? $json.evaluationId : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.candidateName }}',
  {{ $json.durationSeconds }}, '{{ $json.transcript }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.qaPairs }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.communication }}, {{ $json.technical }}, {{ $json.confidence }}, {{ $json.cultureFit }}, {{ $json.overall }},
  '{{ $json.summary }}', '{{ $json.recommendation }}', '{{ $json.perQuestion }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.recordingPath }}', '{{ $json.requirementsMatch }}'::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (candidate_id, job_opening_id) DO UPDATE SET
  duration_seconds     = EXCLUDED.duration_seconds,
  transcript           = EXCLUDED.transcript,
  qa_pairs             = EXCLUDED.qa_pairs,
  score_communication  = EXCLUDED.score_communication,
  score_technical      = EXCLUDED.score_technical,
  score_confidence     = EXCLUDED.score_confidence,
  score_culture_fit    = EXCLUDED.score_culture_fit,
  score_overall        = EXCLUDED.score_overall,
  summary              = EXCLUDED.summary,
  recommendation       = EXCLUDED.recommendation,
  per_question         = EXCLUDED.per_question,
  recording_path       = CASE WHEN EXCLUDED.recording_path <> '' THEN EXCLUDED.recording_path ELSE interview_sessions.recording_path END,
  requirements_match   = CASE WHEN EXCLUDED.requirements_match::text <> '[]' THEN EXCLUDED.requirements_match ELSE interview_sessions.requirements_match END
RETURNING id

SELECT 
  s.id,
  s.candidate_id AS "candidateId",
  s.evaluation_id AS "evaluationId",
  s.job_opening_id AS "jobOpeningId",
  COALESCE(s.candidate_name, c.candidate_name) AS "candidateName",
  s.duration_seconds AS "durationSeconds",
  s.score_communication AS "scoreComm",
  s.score_technical AS "scoreTech",
  s.score_confidence AS "scoreConf",
  s.score_culture_fit AS "scoreCulture",
  s.score_overall AS "scoreOverall",
  s.summary,
  s.recommendation,
  s.per_question AS "perQuestion",
  s.qa_pairs AS "qaPairs",
  s.recording_path AS "recordingPath",
  s.requirements_match AS "requirementsMatch",
  s.created_at AS "completedAt",
  c.email AS "candidateEmail",
  (c.cv_file_data IS NOT NULL AND length(c.cv_file_data::text) > 10) AS "hasCv"
FROM interview_sessions s
JOIN candidates c ON c.id = s.candidate_id
WHERE s.job_opening_id = {{ $json.jobId }}::integer
ORDER BY s.created_at DESC
SELECT id, question, category, job_type AS "jobType", model_answer AS "modelAnswer", times_used AS "timesUsed", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM question_bank ORDER BY created_at DESC

INSERT INTO question_bank (question, category, job_type, model_answer) VALUES ('{{ $json.body.question }}', '{{ $json.body.category || 'hr' }}', '{{ $json.body.jobType || '' }}', '{{ $json.body.modelAnswer || '' }}') RETURNING id, question, category, job_type AS "jobType", model_answer AS "modelAnswer", times_used AS "timesUsed"
DELETE FROM question_bank WHERE id = {{ $json.query.id }}::integer RETURNING id

UPDATE question_bank SET question='{{ $json.body.question }}', category='{{ $json.body.category }}', job_type='{{ $json.body.jobType || '' }}', model_answer='{{ $json.body.modelAnswer || '' }}' WHERE id={{ ($json.query && $json.query.id) || $json.body.id }}::integer RETURNING id, question, category, job_type AS "jobType", model_answer AS "modelAnswer"
